display.name: Audio Spectrum
display.author: prism
display.blurb: 64 mirrored FFT bars, cyan→orange gradient with soft bloom.

annotation.technical_notes: A pixelated horizontal custom wave is rendered with a dual-color gradient transitioning from a cyan core to an orange fringe. A vertical blur pass, likely utilizing a 1D blur in the composite shader, creates a soft glowing pillar effect behind the waveform. The vertical displacement and amplitude of the wave are directly modulated by the low and mid-frequency bands of the music.
